title: CORE Sense Record
description: A single sense of a lemma: a specific mapping from a lemma to a CORE field target, valid under specified constraints.

lemma_id.description: Foreign key to the lemma record.

field_target.description: The CORE shared field primitive this sense maps to. Must exist in the shared primitive vocabulary. E.g. 'speech.creative', 'existence.state', 'identity.relational'.

constraints.description: Conditions under which this sense is valid. E.g. 'copular-frame', 'divine-context', 'temporal-aspect:aorist'.

rank.description: Priority rank for this sense when multiple senses could apply. 1 is primary sense.
